name: Carrot Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the carrots until tender, then mash them.
2. Add butter, onions, sugar, salt, and pepper to the mashed carrots.
3. Stir in cracker crumbs.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and mix with milk.
5. Pour the egg mixture into the carrot mixture.
6. Mix everything together well.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for about 20 minutes.
